series_metadata.series_description: Under the Immigration and Control Act of 1986, employers must verify that every individual hired since November 6, 1986, is eligible to work in the United States and is not an undocumented individual.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Form I-9 must be retained by agency three years or one year past end of employment, whichever is longer ; Electronic: Form I-9 must be retained by agency three years or one year past end of employment, whichever is longer
